revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初八]][[zh:七月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初八]][[zh:七月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初八]][[zh:七月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:7 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:7月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 7월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:七月初八]][[zh:七月初八]]
{{Not to be confused with|July 8|qq=July 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=七月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 7월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar July|qq=}} '''July 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|July (Lunisolar)|ja|7月 (旧暦)|lt=July (Fumizuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/July (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 7th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 4 of {{ill|Kōhō|en|Kōhō|qid=Q1327182|lt=Kōhō|1=Kōhō}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|August 17|en|August 17|qid=Q2827|lt=August 17|1=August 17}} , {{ill|967|en|967|qid=Q23699|lt=967|1=967}} ) – The {{ill|Engishiki|en|Engishiki|qid=Q1342448|lt=Engishiki|1=Engishiki}} was enacted. * Year 3 of {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|qid=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū|1=Jōkyū}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 29|en|July 29|qid=Q2717|lt=July 29|1=July 29}} , {{ill|1221|en|1221|qid=Q5393|lt=1221|1=1221}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Chūkyō|en|Emperor Chūkyō|qid=Q357253|lt=Emperor Chūkyō|1=Emperor Chūkyō}} abdicated, and {{ill|Emperor Go-Horikawa|en|Emperor Go-Horikawa|qid=Q357221|lt=Emperor Go-Horikawa|1=Emperor Go-Horikawa}} ascended to the throne. * Year 3 of {{ill|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|ja|Genroku|1=Genroku|2=ja|3=元禄|qid=Q1325001|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Genroku|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1325001}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 13|en|August 13|qid=Q2776|lt=August 13|1=August 13}} , {{ill|1690|en|1690|qid=Q7678|lt=1690|1=1690}} ) – The {{ill|Shinobuoka Seidō|ja|忍岡聖堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinobuoka Seidō|1=Shinobugaoka Seidō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11490751}} in Ueno was relocated to Yushima, becoming the {{ill|Yushima Seidō|en|Yushima Seidō|qid=Q1760591|lt=Yushima Seidō|1=Yushima Seidō}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 2|en|August 2|qid=Q2785|lt=August 2|1=August 2}} , {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} designated the {{ill|Nisshōki|ja|日章旗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nisshōki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 日本の国旗|1=Flag of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q43175}} as the national ensign for Japanese ships. * Year 4 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 24|en|August 24|qid=Q2825|lt=August 24|1=August 24}} , {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} ) – The {{ill|Ministry of Law|en|Ministry of Law|qid=Q6867357|lt=Ministry of Justice (Japan)|1=Ministry of Law}} was established following the abolition of the {{ill|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|en|Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)|qid=Q6867320|lt=Ministry of Justice|1=Ministry of Justice (pre-modern Japan)}} and the {{ill|Danjōdai|ja|弾正台|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Danjōdai|1=Danjōdai|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11487784}} . * Year 10 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 27|en|July 27|qid=Q2719|lt=July 27|1=July 27}} , {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} ) – {{ill|Taikō Kenchi|ja|太閤検地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taikō Kenchi|1=Taikō kenchi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8193888}} began as {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} conducted the first land survey in {{ill|Ōmi Province|en|Ōmi Province|qid=Q843882|lt=Ōmi Province|1=Ōmi Province}} . * Year 16 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 29|en|August 29|qid=Q2816|lt=August 29|1=August 29}} , {{ill|1588|en|1588|qid=Q6757|lt=1588|1=1588}} ) – The {{ill|Sword Hunt|ja|刀狩令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sword Hunt|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 刀狩|1=Sword hunt|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1133763}} was issued, confiscating weapons from peasants, and the Maritime Prohibition Order was enacted to restrict piracy. * Year 16 of {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|qid=Q1192913|lt=Kanei|1=Kan'ei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 6|en|August 6|qid=Q2787|lt=August 6|1=August 6}} , {{ill|1639|en|1639|qid=Q6897|lt=1639|1=1639}} ) – A library was established in {{ill|Kōyōzan|ja|紅葉山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōyōzan|1=momijiyama|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11605266}} within {{ill|Edo Castle|en|Edo Castle|qid=Q865913|lt=Edo Castle|1=Edo Castle}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Tenmei|en|Tenmei|qid=Q1194121|lt=Tenmei|1=Tenmei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}} , {{ill|1783|en|1783|qid=Q7745|lt=1783|1=1783}} ) – The {{ill|Tenmei eruption|en|Tenmei eruption|qid=Q106959236|lt=Great Tenmei Eruption|1=Tenmei eruption}} of {{ill|Mount Asama|en|Mount Asama|qid=Q242730|lt=Mount Asama|1=Mount Asama}} began, contributing to the {{ill|Great Tenmei famine|en|Great Tenmei famine|qid=Q9030108|lt=Tenmei famine|1=Great Tenmei famine}} . * Year 5 of {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 16|en|August 16|qid=Q2812|lt=August 16|1=August 16}} , {{ill|1858|en|1858|qid=Q7684|lt=1858|1=1858}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} established the {{ill|Gaikoku bugyō|en|Gaikoku bugyō|qid=Q81986|lt=Gaikoku Bugyō|1=Gaikoku bugyō}} , a government office overseeing foreign affairs. * Year 2 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 15|en|August 15|qid=Q2774|lt=August 15|1=August 15}} , {{ill|1869|en|1869|qid=Q7720|lt=1869|1=1869}} ) – The {{ill|Meiji government|ja|明治政府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiji government|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 明治維新|1=Meiji Restoration|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8707}} established the {{ill|Hokkaidō Development Commission|en|Hokkaidō Development Commission|qid=Q524428|lt=Development Commission (Japan)|1=Hokkaidō Development Commission}} in {{ill|Ezo|1=Emishi|2=ja|3=蝦夷|ja|Ezo地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ezo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q932574}} .
== Births == * Year 3 of {{ill|Jōryaku|en|Jōryaku|qid=Q279743|lt=Jōryaku|1=Jōryaku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 8|en|August 8|qid=Q2780|lt=August 8|1=August 8}} , {{ill|1079|en|1079|qid=Q19445|lt=1079|1=1079}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Horikawa|en|Emperor Horikawa|qid=Q464267|lt=Emperor Horikawa|1=Emperor Horikawa}} , 73rd emperor of Japan (d. {{ill|1107|en|1107|qid=Q19511|lt=1107|1=1107}} ) * Year 2 of {{ill|Shōwa (1312–1317)|en|Shōwa (1312–1317)|qid=Q1324807|lt=Shōwa (Kamakura period)|1=Shōwa (1312–1317)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 1|en|August 1|qid=Q2788|lt=August 1|1=August 1}} , {{ill|1313|en|1313|qid=Q5735|lt=1313|1=1313}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Kōgon|en|Emperor Kōgon|qid=Q471885|lt=Emperor Kōgon|1=Emperor Kōgon}} , first emperor of the Northern Court (d. {{ill|1364|en|1364|qid=Q6185|lt=1364|1=1364}} ) * Year 16 of {{ill|Tenbun|en|Tenbun|qid=Q1192853|lt=Tenbun|1=Tenbun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 25|en|July 25|qid=Q2720|lt=July 25|1=July 25}} , {{ill|1547|en|1547|qid=Q6547|lt=1547|1=1547}} ) – {{ill|Maeda Matsu|en|Maeda Matsu|qid=Q836600|lt=Hoshunin|1=Maeda Matsu}} , wife of {{ill|Maeda Toshiie|ja|Maeda Toshiie|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Maeda Toshiie|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (d. {{ill|1617|en|1617|qid=Q6798|lt=1617|1=1617}} ) * Year 1 of {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 25|en|August 25|qid=Q2819|lt=August 25|1=August 25}} , {{ill|1868|en|1868|qid=Q7717|lt=1868|1=1868}} ) – {{ill|Yamada Bimyō|en|Yamada Bimyō|qid=Q1072569|lt=Yamada Bimyō|1=Yamada Bimyō}} , novelist and linguist (d. {{ill|1910|en|1910|qid=Q2075|lt=1910|1=1910}} )
== Deaths == * Year 3 of {{ill|Kyōroku|en|Kyōroku|qid=Q1193418|lt=Kyōroku|1=Kyōroku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|August 2|en|August 2|qid=Q2785|lt=August 2|1=August 2}} , {{ill|1530|en|1530|qid=Q6429|lt=1530|1=1530}} ) – {{ill|Kanō Masanobu|en|Kanō Masanobu|qid=Q28931|lt=Kanō Masanobu|1=Kanō Masanobu}} , painter (b. {{ill|1434|en|1434|qid=Q6360|lt=1434|1=1434}} ) * Year 2 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 21|en|August 21|qid=Q2823|lt=August 21|1=August 21}} , {{ill|1597|en|1597|qid=Q6790|lt=1597|1=1597}} ) – {{ill|Mōri Motokiyo|en|Mōri Motokiyo|qid=Q859974|lt=Hoida Motokiyo|1=Mōri Motokiyo}} , fourth son of {{ill|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|ja|Mōri Motonari|1=Mōri Motonari|2=ja|3=毛利元就|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri Motonari|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1156545}} (b. {{ill|1551|en|1551|qid=Q6560|lt=1551|1=1551}} ) * Year 17 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 5|en|August 5|qid=Q2783|lt=August 5|1=August 5}} , {{ill|1612|en|1612|qid=Q6771|lt=1612|1=1612}} ) – {{ill|Nōhime|en|Nōhime|qid=Q1071045|lt=Nōhime|1=Nōhime}} , wife of {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} (b. {{ill|1535|en|1535|qid=Q6453|lt=1535|1=1535}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|7|7|7|9|6|8|8|7|0708|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 7월 8일]] [[ja:7月8日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:七月初八]]
[[ar:July 8 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月初八]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:7 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:七月初八]] {{wikidata link|Q839706}} [[Category:Days 8 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar July]] [[Category:Tomobiki]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
